decisions.title: Discover Skills From Metadata Before Loading Instructions
decisions.description: The chapter models skills as discoverable units with metadata, paths, and activation conditions. This shows why a skill system can stay large without injecting every instruction all the time.
decisions.alternatives: Loading every skill file into the prompt is easy to implement, but it wastes context and removes selective activation.

zh.title: 先靠元数据发现技能，再决定是否加载说明
zh.description: 技能先以可发现单元的形式出现，只有命中条件时才注入说明，这样技能系统才能扩展而不持续占用上下文。

ja.title: まずメタデータでスキルを発見し、必要時だけ読む
ja.description: スキルは発見可能な単位として扱い、条件に合ったときだけ説明を注入します。これにより大きなスキル集合でも常時文脈を圧迫しません。

decisions.title: Activation Rules Matter As Much As The Skill Content
decisions.description: A good skill system is not just storage for prompts. It also decides when a skill is relevant, which is why this chapter includes path and context-based activation.
decisions.alternatives: Manual skill selection by the user is possible, but it misses the lesson that the harness can help decide what knowledge should be active.

zh.title: 技能内容之外，激活规则同样重要
zh.description: 好的技能系统不只是提示词仓库，还要判断何时相关，因此这里加入了路径和上下文条件激活。

ja.title: スキル内容だけでなく発火条件も重要
ja.description: 良いスキルシステムは単なるプロンプト置き場ではなく、いつ関連するかも判断します。
